descriptions.text: Q-Boy is an unlicensed platform video game developed and published by Thin Chen Enterprise/Sachen, released for the Family Computer in March 5 1994. Not to be confused with the Famiclone game console of the same title.

Far away in the Q Galaxy, there is a glittering planet where lives numerous odd animals. For having the Rainbow-Flower, animals there all have happy and peaceful lives. However, good times don't last long. A bad guy named Dr. Mouse comes and takes the Rainbow-Flower away. He establishes a base there and tries to rule the world with the Rainbow-Flower. At this critical time, here comes the brave Q~Boy. Can he help the animals to defeat Dr. Mouse and find the Rainbow-Flower back again?

QBoy (born Marcos Jose Brito on 10 October 1978) is a UK-based rapper, producer, DJ, writer and presenter. He is one of the original few out rappers in hip hop circa 2001 that became pioneers of the new subgenre colloquially known as "homo hop". QBoy is currently a DJ and promoter of popular LGBTQ club night and party 'R & She: The Queens of Hip-Hop & R&B' which hosts events in London, Berlin and New York City.
